The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: The back of his chair above the gray fog features a constellation forming the symbol of 'Storm'.
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Klein recognized the symbol on his chair.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: The back of her chair above the gray fog features an illusory constellation forming the symbol of a 'Giant Dragon'.
Justice.source_notes: Klein observed the symbol after she became a Beyonder.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Described from the picture in the notebook.

Captain.primary_clothing: dark maritime captain's coat over a simple shirt
Captain.face_description: sharp, sea-weathered features with a stern gaze
Captain.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, tanned skin, windblown black hair, athletic build, wearing a dark maritime captain's coat
Captain.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as the recipient who wants the Ghost Shark's blood.

Antigonus.unique_identifier: surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads
Antigonus.era_clothing_lock: tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt, dark formal trousers, bare feet
Antigonus.face_description: partially hidden behind a thick beard and unkempt hair, visible sharp intense eyes
Antigonus.visual_anchor: tall lean pale male surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads, wearing a tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt
Antigonus.color_palette: black, dark grey, pale white, shadow
Antigonus.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name and family of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Amon.unique_identifier: wears a crystal monocle on his right eye
Amon.era_clothing_lock: classic Victorian black pointed hat, double-breasted black frock coat, black trousers, dark vest, crisp white shirt
Amon.face_description: sharp facial features, wide forehead, thin lips and calculating gaze
Amon.visual_anchor: late 20s pale male with sharp features wearing a crystal monocle on his right eye, dressed in a classic Victorian black pointed hat and double-breasted black frock coat
Amon.color_palette: black, crystal clear, white, dark grey
Amon.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; details guessed based on lore.

Abraham.unique_identifier: carries a star-charted silver pocket watch
Abraham.era_clothing_lock: dark blue tailcoat, silver brocade waistcoat, white cravat, black trousers, leather oxford shoes
Abraham.face_description: scholarly face with soft wrinkles, high cheekbones, and wise observant eyes
Abraham.visual_anchor: older adult male with scholarly wrinkled face carrying a star-charted silver pocket watch, wearing a dark blue tailcoat and silver brocade waistcoat
Abraham.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Jacob.unique_identifier: wears a silver ring shaped like a coiled snake on his left index finger
Jacob.era_clothing_lock: charcoal grey morning coat, forest green waistcoat, ascot tie, grey striped trousers, polished leather boots
Jacob.face_description: narrow face with a sharp nose and a calculating, sly gaze
Jacob.visual_anchor: tall lean olive-skinned male wearing a silver coiled snake ring on his left index finger, dressed in a charcoal grey morning coat and forest green waistcoat
Jacob.color_palette: charcoal grey, forest green, silver, dark brown
Jacob.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Blood Emperor.era_clothing_lock: regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat with gold epaulettes, dark trousers, riding boots
Blood Emperor.face_description: majestic and arrogant face with a strong jawline and deep-set commanding eyes
Blood Emperor.visual_anchor: tall athletic pale male with hands permanently stained with blood, wearing a regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat
Blood Emperor.color_palette: deep crimson, gold, black, rusted iron
Blood Emperor.source_notes: Mentioned as the fallen ruler of the Tudor Empire; appearance guessed.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Identifies himself as a 'Mystery Pryer' and mentions the trait of temperance for the sequence.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers

Daly.face_description: uncanny beauty with twinkling emerald eyes and striking blue eyeshadow; face framed by the hood of her black robe
Daly.visual_anchor: strikingly beautiful woman in a floor-length hooded black Victorian robe, twinkling emerald eyes accentuated by blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with white crystal pendant on wrist
Daly.color_palette: deep black, cobalt blue, silver, white crystal
Daly.distinguishing_features: Spirit Medium; prefers working with corpses; uses aromatic floral essences (Amantha, Eye of the Spirit) for mediumship rituals; can perceive and communicate with spirits
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with white crystal pendant, waist pouch with glass vials
Daly.source_notes: Old Neil mentions she 'clamored to be a real Spirit Medium'.
Daly.unique_identifier: twinkling emerald eyes, hooded black robe with blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with hanging white crystal pendant
Daly.era_clothing_lock: floor-length hooded black robe, blue eyeshadow and rouge blush, exposed silver bracelet with white crystal pendant at wrist, waist pouch holding glass vials

Sunk Psychology Alchemist.unique_identifier: seaweed tangled in his collar and water constantly dripping from his sleeves
Sunk Psychology Alchemist.era_clothing_lock: waterlogged navy blue double-breasted pilot coat, sodden white shirt, dark wet trousers, heavy leather boots
Sunk Psychology Alchemist.face_description: bloated slightly with wide eyes showing residual fear and pale bluish lips
Sunk Psychology Alchemist.visual_anchor: adult sickly pale male with seaweed tangled in his collar and water dripping from his sleeves, wearing a waterlogged navy blue double-breasted pilot coat
Sunk Psychology Alchemist.color_palette: navy blue, sickly pale, sea green, dark grey
Sunk Psychology Alchemist.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as the Psychology Alchemist member he sank in the seas around Sonia Island.
